name: gemini-cli-scheduler
description: Powerful extension for scheduling tasks, shell commands, and reminders. Supports Jules, Gemini, and Ollama executors with relative time support.
author: Hermann Hahn

scripts.update:version: npm run lint && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/update-version.js && npx webpack && npm run push:version
scripts.push:version: git add . && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git commit -m \"chore: bump version to ' + v + '\"', {stdio: 'inherit'})" && git push origin development
scripts.publish:release: git push origin main --follow-tags && npm run push:release
scripts.push:release: node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('gh release create v' + v + ' --generate-notes', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.deploy: git checkout main && git pull origin main && git merge development --no-edit && npm run lint && npx webpack && git add tool_code.js && git commit -m 'chore: build tool_code.js for release' || true && git push origin main && node -e "const v = require('./package.json').version; require('child_process').execSync('git tag -f v' + v + ' && git push origin -f v' + v, {stdio: 'inherit'})" && npm run push:release && npm run cleanup-releases && npm run update && git checkout development
